<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Logging\JUnit; use PHPUnit\Event\InvalidArgumentException; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\PreparationFailed; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\PreparationFailedSubscriber; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class TestPreparationFailedSubscriber extends Subscriber implements PreparationFailedSubscriber { /** * @throws InvalidArgumentException */ public function notify(PreparationFailed $event): void { $this->logger()->testPreparationFailed(); } }
